themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Bede on Commentary on Ezra and Nehemiah: In the first year of Cyrus, king of Persia, etc. Anc...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֔רֶץ: of the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
